why: Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound minecraft:resource_pack_pop must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and official body generated by the oracle answer. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence for an official present-UUID fixture only, not resource-pack UI behavior, pack removal policy, download/reload behavior, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 8, official body bytes) because the current Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound table has no mapping for packet id 0x08.
stop_condition: The exact Rust oracle test passes, then bash oracle/scripts/run_jar_backed_oracle_tests.sh passes without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts.
